Notes: The update prerequisites are satisfied by targeting a name that exists in the zone, while the operation deletes an RRset that is absent. This probes whether the server treats the missing-target delete as a no-op or as a semantic update failure.

Steps.Description: Prerequisites succeed, then delete an absent TXT RRset at a name inside the zone.

Steps.Name: ghost.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the absent TXT RRset remains absent after the UPDATE attempt.
